prompt: Product photograph. Single subject: one white plastic measuring scoop tilted at 45 degrees, white protein powder cascading and falling from the scoop in a dramatic pour, powder particles frozen mid-air. Pure white background. Bright even studio lighting. No other elements, no surface, no shadows on background. Clean isolated cutout product shot.
negative_prompt: dark background, colored background, other objects, glass, bottle, can, logo, text, watermark, people, floor surface
